arts.ttl: Former Premier League star named boss of League One outfit Crawley Town
arts.sum: Rob Elliot made more than 200 appearances during his playing career and joins Crawley after a successful spell with National League Gateshead

arts.ttl: Crawley Town swoop for National League boss in Scott Lindsey replacement hunt
arts.sum: Crawley Town are swooping for Gateshead boss Rob Elliot as their Scott Lindsey replacement, according to reporter Alan… The post Crawley Town swoop for National League boss in Scott Lindsey replacement hunt appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
